creator: rfg-freebsd@tristatelogic.com
text:
Sorry again.

I do have the aforementioned package installed, but it appears that, as I said originally, CUPS comes with its own SMNP program, and it is located here:

/usr/local/libexec/cups/backend/snmp

I don't frankly know if this is the same one that is installed when one installs net-snmp-5.7.3_19 or not.  All I know is that "man smtp" produces "No manual entry for snmp".
